Models/MiniMax: add first-class `MiniMax-M2.5-highspeed` support across built-in provider catalogs, onboarding flows, and MiniMax
Sessions/Attachments: add inline file attachment support for `sessions_spawn` (subagent runtime only) with base64/utf8 encoding, t

Telegram/DM streaming: use `sendMessageDraft` for private preview streaming, keep reasoning/answer preview lanes separated in DM r
Telegram/voice mention gating: add optional `disableAudioPreflight` on group/topic config to skip mention-detection preflight tran
incorporation: 🔒 38 security patches — update is mandatory, no config changes required
Migrate TMNT credentials to `openclaw secrets` — stop hardcoding tokens in scripts
Discord fixes apply to #command-center and squad channel monitoring
Auth handling improvements — verify all agent tokens post-update
Sub-agent spawning improvements — check thread=true behaviour in Discord sessions
Telegram fixes apply to Guillermo's briefing and alert delivery
